title: Rose Painting
message: This rose bloomed for you the day I first saw your smile.

title: Moon & Stars
message: When the world is quiet, I wish upon the same moon for you.

title: Love Letter Art
message: Words I saved in my pocket for the perfect midnight—this is one of them.

title: Teddy Sketch
message: A soft thing to hold when I can't be near — always yours.

title: Sunset Couple
message: We watched the sun leave the sky and decided to stay.

title: Heart Flame
message: A small flame, kept alive only by thinking of you.

title: Sakura Petals
message: Petals falling like quiet promises — every one for you.

title: Glow Star
message: A small star to guide you back to me when night is long.

title: Handwritten Poem
message: Lines I wrote in the quiet — every line belongs to you.

title: Minimal Line Art Face
message: Simple lines — complex heart. I see you in every curve.

title: Couple Silhouette
message: Two silhouettes against the light — our small forever.

title: Two Hands Touching
message: When our fingers meet, all the noise fades away.

title: Candlelight Mood
message: A warm light for cold nights — my whisper beside you.

title: Healed Heart
message: We broke and glued ourselves stronger — this heart is proof.

title: Bow Ribbon Art
message: Wrapped and waiting — a tiny token of my constant care.
